sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 61 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 27. 2. For orders on CMA No. 496/24 (Eemption0 3. For hearing of main case. 30.10.2025 Mr. Sajjad Ali Solangi, advocate for applicant. This reference is pending since 2024. On the last date, learned counsel sought time and at his request today’s date was given. Even today, he is unprepared and merely seeks time. It appears that applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue, RTO-1 is not interested in proceeding with this matter and therefore, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
